creator: ian@FreeBSD.org
text: This change actually needs to be made to all clang* and llvm* ports.  I ran into the same thing building clang-devel native on a wandboard.  I fixed it in both clang-devel and llvm-devel with the attached patch-utils_llvm-build_llvmbui file.  I suspect this same file can be dropped into all the versions.
